2134400.name: Ruffhouse VR Basketball Simulator
2134400.description:
Ruffhouse VR is the first full-game basketball simulator of its kind. The game is a new approach to VR basketball involving Unreal Engine physics, innovative use of motion control and an opportunity for players to compete in an ongoing online community to create a true simulated experience.

This single and multi-player basketball simulator is meant to highlight the game, “Twenty-One,” a popular street basketball game played amongst amateurs in urban cities around the country. The single version of Ruffhouse VR is one player versus 4-8 AI defensive characters. While it can be played solo, at release we plan to enable the ability to be joined by up to 3 friends. This multi-player version will allow you to hone your single-player skills and shine bright as a prospective asset on a team.



Key Features:

· Crowd: Crowd reactions are determined by scoring momentum.

· Entourage: Build an entourage that serves as your very own cheering squad.

· Level-Up: Increase your stats such as speed, jump height, shot accuracy, steal ability and much more.

· Play Mode: Players have the option of a 5v5 full court scrimmage or Ruffhouse, 4 player co-op vs 4 AI.

· Physics based interactions

· Dribble/Shot Mechanics: Unique dribble and shot mechanics enable you to string together moves and game winning plays.

· Dunking Flares: Style your dunks to taunt opponents or impress friends

· RPG Elements: Players can customize their avatars, uniforms, entourage, and skill-leveling system.
2134400.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
